title: Pore Engineering Foundation
breakthrough: Achievement of 2nm Uniform Mesoporous Architecture in Synthetic Amorphous Silica (SAS).
impact: Established the theoretical limit for surface area-to-volume ratio in feed carriers, enabling high-load liquid absorption without clumping.

title: Molecular Shielding & Protection
breakthrough: Invention of the 'Molecular Shield'—protecting sensitive phytase and protease at 95°C constant extrusion heat.
impact: 88% recovery of bioactive payloads in tropical processing environments, bypassing the need for over-dosing.
economic_contribution: $24M annual enzyme cost recovery for Tier-1 feed mills.

title: Mekong Delta Field Validation
breakthrough: Real-world validation of 'Cation Magnet' technology for rapid Ammonia-N reduction and AGP-free gut integrity.
impact: -1.5ppm Ammonia-N reduction within 4 hours; 40% reduction in mortality during high-density shrimp cycles.
economic_contribution: $1.2k per hectare profit increase for semi-intensive farms.

title: Scientific Empire & Digitalization
breakthrough: Integration of Matrix 1000 Autonomous Outreach and Aqua-Profit™ Real-time ROI Forecasting.
impact: Closing the loop between molecular science and farm-gate profitability through AI-driven nutritional modeling.
economic_contribution: Predictive FCR optimization saving $0.05 per kg of biomass.
